mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.role_code as roleCode, r.role_name as roleName, r.description, r.status, r.sort_order as sortOrder, r.created_by as createdBy, r.created_time as createdTime, r.updated_by as updatedBy, r.updated_time as updatedTime, r.deleted FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = 0
AND r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND r.role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleCode}, '%')
AND r.status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC, r.created_time DESC
